creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
Author: lme
Date: Sat Jul  6 09:46:33 2013
New Revision: 322375
URL: http://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/322375

Log:
  - Update to 3.0.7.2
  - While here, move OPTIONS_DEFINE before bsd.port.options.mk
  
  PR:		ports/180329
  Submitted by:	maintainer

Modified:
  head/audio/teamspeak3-server/Makefile
  head/audio/teamspeak3-server/distinfo

Modified: head/audio/teamspeak3-server/Makefile
==============================================================================
--- head/audio/teamspeak3-server/Makefile	Sat Jul  6 09:25:02 2013	(r322374)
+++ head/audio/teamspeak3-server/Makefile	Sat Jul  6 09:46:33 2013	(r322375)
@@ -2,7 +2,7 @@
 # $FreeBSD$
 
 PORTNAME=	teamspeak3-server
-PORTVERSION=	3.0.7
+PORTVERSION=	3.0.7.2
 PORTEPOCH=	1
 CATEGORIES=	audio net
 MASTER_SITES=	http://teamspeak.gameserver.gamed.de/ts3/releases/${PORTVERSION}/ \
@@ -45,10 +45,10 @@ PLIST_SUB+=	DBDIR=${DBDIR} \
 SUB_LIST+=	DBDIR=${DBDIR} \
 		LOGDIR=${LOGDIR}
 
-.include <bsd.port.options.mk>
-
 OPTIONS_DEFINE=	DOCS
 
+.include <bsd.port.options.mk>
+
 .if ${ARCH} ==	"i386"
 TEAMSPEAK_ARCH=	x86
 .endif

Modified: head/audio/teamspeak3-server/distinfo
==============================================================================
--- head/audio/teamspeak3-server/distinfo	Sat Jul  6 09:25:02 2013	(r322374)
+++ head/audio/teamspeak3-server/distinfo	Sat Jul  6 09:46:33 2013	(r322375)
@@ -1,4 +1,2 @@
-SIZE (teamspeak3-server_freebsd-amd64-3.0.7.tar.gz) = 4396745

-SIZE (teamspeak3-server_freebsd-x86-3.0.7.tar.gz) = 4887041
-SHA256 (teamspeak3-server_freebsd-x86-3.0.7.tar.gz) = 016daa5f33a5089aefc5a3cb11ed89b4540f43a561c96badeca6df3d86168b33
+SHA256 (teamspeak3-server_freebsd-amd64-3.0.7.2.tar.gz) = 967fccbd2fa5d1ddd964455ea82dfeae052f1309bc26c646ca90c21016be5c66
+SIZE (teamspeak3-server_freebsd-amd64-3.0.7.2.tar.gz) = 4429373
